game.description: A single-player roguelike where you play mahjong hands to clear score targets, with a shop for buying god tiles and flower cards.

milestones.title: Initial Playable Hand System
milestones.description: Implement core mahjong hand mechanics and scoring, with basic win forms.

tasks.title: Define Tile Types and Basic Gameplay Logic
tasks.description: Design tile types (numbers, winds, dragons) and implement basic gameplay logic to draw 14 tiles and discard.

agents.system_prompt: Design the tile types (numbers, winds, dragons) and define their properties in a way that supports the core gameplay mechanics.

tasks.title: Implement Winning Hands and Scoring Mechanics
tasks.description: Implement the logic for winning hands, including calculating scores based on fan patterns.

agents.system_prompt: Define the logic for winning hands and scoring, including basic fan patterns.
Implement the logic for winning hands and calculating scores based on fan patterns.

tasks.title: Create Basic User Interface
tasks.description: Develop a basic user interface to display tiles, hand, and score.

agents.system_prompt: Design the user interface for displaying tiles, hands, and scores.
Develop a basic user interface to display tiles, hand, and score using Phaser 3.

tasks.title: Initial Playtest for Hand System
tasks.description: Conduct initial playtests to ensure the basic mahjong hand mechanics work as intended.

agents.system_prompt: Run initial playtests to ensure the basic mahjong hand mechanics work as intended.
Analyze early playtest data and propose adjustments if necessary.

playtest_criteria.description: Player can form basic winning hands
